references.purpose: Claim-level checks, severity definitions, finding fields, and the review pass rule.
references.evidence_boundary: Defines review procedure; reviewer success does not establish scientific truth.

references.purpose: Prepare blinded, hash-bound review packets and validate separate reviewer responses without exposing producer-only rationale.
read_when: before handing a run to a separate reviewer
before calling a review independent or reproduced
required_before: attaching a packet-derived review receipt to a run
references.authority: Codex Science first-party review packet contract
references.evidence_boundary: The runtime standardizes packet and receipt coverage but does not authenticate reviewer identity or guarantee independence.
